title: calliandra trinervia var. arborea
intro: Calliandra trinervia var. arborea, also known as the Red Powder Puff or Powder Puff Tree, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and trifoliate leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calliandra trinervia var. arborea include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies and folkloric treatments.
